content:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on README.md:
1	# Project Overview
2	
3	This project is a web application.
4	
5	## Programming Languages
6	- TypeScript
7	- JavaScript
8	
9	## High-Level Architecture
10	- Frontend: Next.js (React)
11	- Backend: Next.js API Routes
12	- Database: Prisma with PostgreSQL
13	
14	## LLM Provider
15	- OpenAI (configured via environment variables)
